name: SCAR-20 | 军队之辉
descriptionEn: The SCAR-20 is a semi-automatic sniper rifle that trades a high rate of fire and powerful long-distance damage for sluggish movement speed and big price tag. It has been covered in a metallic foil stamped with a camouflage pattern. Remember your training
descriptionZh: SCAR-20 是一把以迟缓的移动速度和高昂的价格为代价，换取高射速及强大的远距离杀伤力的半自动狙击步枪。 这把武器覆上了印有迷彩图案的金属箔。 勿忘在部队的训练时光
